name: Shameless (US)
description: Showtime's 2011-2021 drama about the dysfunctional Gallagher family on Chicago's South Side

questions.q: On which U.S. premium cable network does Shameless air?

source.notes: Ran for 11 seasons, from 2011-2021.

questions.q: Which Oscar-nominated actor plays patriarch Frank Gallagher?

source.notes: Won multiple SAG Awards for the role.

questions.q: Which actress plays Frank's eldest daughter, Fiona, through Season 9?

source.notes: Left the series after Season 9 in 2019.

questions.q: In which U.S. city is the American version of Shameless set?

source.notes: Specifically the Back of the Yards neighborhood.

questions.q: Which Gallagher sibling is played by Jeremy Allen White (who later starred in The Bear)?

source.notes: Lip is the MIT-level smart sibling.

questions.q: Who plays the youthful, bipolar Ian Gallagher?

source.notes: Later joined the Batman universe on Gotham as the Joker-adjacent Valeska twins.

questions.q: Which country's original TV series is the American Shameless adapted from?

source.notes: The UK original aired on Channel 4 from 2004.

questions.q: In what year did Shameless (US) premiere?

source.notes: Premiered on Showtime after 10pm Sunday.

questions.q: How many seasons did the American Shameless run?

source.notes: 134 episodes total.

questions.q: Who developed the American version of Shameless?

source.notes: Veteran producer of ER and The West Wing.

questions.q: Who created the original UK Channel 4 version of Shameless?

source.notes: Ran on Channel 4 from 2004 to 2013.

questions.q: Which Academy Award-nominated actress plays Frank's sheltered Season-1 love interest Sheila Jackson?

source.notes: Won a Primetime Emmy for Outstanding Guest Actress in a Drama.

questions.q: Which Chicago neighborhood is the show's setting most often associated with?

source.notes: Back of the Yards is the Gallagher family's specific neighborhood.

questions.q: What substance-use struggle does Frank Gallagher contend with throughout the series?

source.notes: Chiefly alcohol; diagnosed with alcohol dementia in Season 11.

questions.q: Which mental health condition is Ian Gallagher eventually diagnosed with?

source.notes: Inherited from his biological mother Monica.

questions.q: Ian marries whom in Season 10 — a fan-favorite moment in the series?

source.notes: Their relationship was a slow-burn fan favorite.

questions.q: Who plays Ian's on-again/off-again love interest Mickey Milkovich?

source.notes: Also appeared in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014).

questions.q: Who plays Veronica 'V' Fisher, the Gallaghers' fiercely loyal next-door neighbor?

source.notes: Married to Kev Ball (Steve Howey).

questions.q: Which Gallagher sibling becomes a Chicago police officer after earlier getting into trouble with the law?

source.notes: Played by Ethan Cutkosky.

questions.q: Which band performs the Shameless opening theme song 'The Luck You Got'?

source.original_a: The Luck You Got by The High Strung
source.notes: A Detroit indie-rock band.

questions.q: Which Showtime show did Shameless eventually surpass to become the network's longest-running original scripted series?

source.notes: Dexter's original run had 8 seasons (2006-2013).

questions.q: Before Joan Cusack was cast, which actress was originally set to play Sheila Jackson before dropping out?

source.notes: Janney was attached to an early pilot version.
